definition: F_i(t)\in[0,1]\ \text{(often binary)};\ F_i=1\ \text{means fasting on compartment }i.

name: Partitioned Reserve (Charge / Stored Potential)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: State variable storing charge accumulated during constraint phases
definition: Q_i(t)\ge 0\ \text{accumulates during fasting and is released during return/training.}

name: Overload Gain (Supercompensation Multiplier)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Multiplicative gain on engagement intensity after fasting
definition: \mathcal{O}_i(t)=1+\frac{Q_i(t)}{M_i(t)+\varepsilon}.

name: Capture Operator (Photo/Video/Metric Logging)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: \mathcal{C}_{cap}:\ \text{session state}\mapsto \mathrm{Obs}_i(n)\ \text{(artifact/metric)}.

name: Artifact / Aspiration Trace
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Slow state updated by evidence to guide policy
definition: A_i(n+1)=(1-\lambda_A)A_i(n)+\lambda_A\,\mathrm{Obs}_i(n).

name: Softmax Allocation Map
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Maps scores into a simplex allocation
definition: \mathrm{softmax}_\beta(A)_i=\frac{e^{\beta A_i}}{\sum_j e^{\beta A_j}}.

name: Logistic Sigmoid
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: \sigma(x)=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}}.

name: Indicator Function (Hard Gate)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: \mathbb{1}_{\{condition\}}=\begin{cases}1,&\text{if condition true}\\0,&\text{otherwise}\end{cases}

name: Available Compartment Mana
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Sub-ledger state variable for usable resource in compartment i
definition: M_{i,\mathrm{avail}}(t)=M_i(t)-Q_i(t).

name: Dyad Allocation Share (Relational Partition Weight)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Allocation weight for dyad partition i=⊗ in M_{i,avail}(t)=π_i(t) M_avail(t).
definition: Fraction of available mana allocated to the dyad/relationship channel at time t.

name: Dyad Available Mana (Dyad Resource Pool)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Dyad-specific available resource pool driving dyad formation kinetics.
definition: M_⊗,avail(t)=π_⊗(t) M_avail(t): the resource allocated to forming/maintaining coupling with Other.

name: Effective Dyad Formation Rate (Partition-Gated)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Resource-gated effective coupling growth rate for dyads.
definition: r_eff,⊗(t)=r_form σ(M_⊗,avail(t)−M_form) (or Θ gate): formation speed depends on dyad-partition mana.

name: Phenomenological Projection Operator (Modality m)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Projection from latent cognitive state x(t) into modality-specific phenomenological coordinates.
definition: Maps latent state x(t) into a modality channel (voice, imagery, etc.): y_m∝Π_m x.

name: Modality Gain (Trait Parameter for Channel m)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Multiplicative gain controlling the strength/vividness of modality channel m.
definition: Trait gain for modality rendering; e.g., very small g_img models aphantasia-like low imagery render.

name: Rendered Phenomenological Signal (Channel m)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Observable/readout channel representing experienced intensity of modality m at time t.
definition: Rendered phenomenology in modality m (e.g., inner voice, imagery). Modeled as y_m=g_m σ(M_m−M_{m,0}) Π_m x + ε_m.

name: Metacognitive Threshold for Reporting Channel m
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Threshold mapping continuous phenomenology y_m into categorical self-report.
definition: Subjective threshold for labeling a modality as 'present' (e.g., 'I have an inner voice').

name: Metacognitive Self-Report Bit (Channel Present/Absent)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Binary/categorical report derived from y_m(t) by thresholding.
definition: R_m(t)=1(|y_m(t)|>θ_m): coarse report used in surveys ('yes/no inner voice').

name: Internal Dyad Coupling: Speaker ⊗ Listener
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Dyadic coupling strength between internal speech generator (S) and auditory-monitoring subsystem (L).
definition: C_SL(t)=(1−ν) ρ_SL(t): internal coupling that makes inner speech feel 'audible'.

name: Speaker–Listener Correlation/Coherence
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Correlation/coherence metric between internal modules S and L.
definition: Any normalized coupling metric (correlation, coherence, PLV) between internal speech generator and auditory imagery/monitoring subsystems.

name: Executive Mana Partition (Control/Planning Budget)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Partition of mana allocated to executive control processes (planning, inhibition, working memory).
definition: Executive resource pool driving task coherence: κ_task=F(x,M_exec). Can remain high even when voice/imagery render is low.

name: Linguistic content stream
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Latent inner-speech / linguistic token stream (content) independent of auditory qualia.

name: Auditory qualia render
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Auditory ‘voice-like’ rendering component (timbre/pitch/volume qualia) associated with inner speech.

name: Audibility report threshold
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Metacognitive threshold on auditory qualia magnitude used to classify an inner voice as ‘audible.’

name: Auditory mana available
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Partitioned mana available for auditory/inner-voice rendering (subset of total M(t)).

name: Render threshold mana
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Minimum mana required to sustain vivid phenomenological rendering (here: auditory inner voice).

name: Voice-style mixture weight
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Weight on voice prototype v_k in a mixture model of inner-voice timbre/style.

name: Voice prototype vector
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Prototype timbre/style embedding used to generate auditory qualia q(t) via mixture weights w_k(t).

name: Master Loop Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Composite operator / Poincaré map for one full PCI loop
definition: \bigoplus_M := \hat{R}\circ \mathcal{L}_{dual}\circ \hat{E}\circ \mathcal{C}_{ol}. Applies (reality recognition → dual translation → equation creation → descent) as a single update.

name: PCI Master State
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: A state (or orbit) satisfying \bigoplus_M^k|\Psi_{master}\rangle=|\Psi_{master}\rangle for some k\in\mathbb{N}.

name: Self-Model Information Ratio
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: \mathcal{I}_{self}:=I(X;\hat{X})/I_{max}. Fraction of internal state information captured by the self-model; bounded by 1-\nu_{void}.

name: Optimal Closed-Loop Policy
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: \pi^{*}:\;y\mapsto u. Policy that maximizes an expected utility objective under mana/resource continuity and partial observability constraints.

name: Voice Feedback Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Coupling strength from rendered voice to cognition
definition: \alpha_{voice}\in[0,1]. Degree to which auditory inner-voice rendering q_aud(t) feeds back into cognitive dynamics (rehearsal, self-talk control).

name: Modality Projection Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
mathematicalRole: Projection from latent state to modality-m content
definition: \Pi_m[x(t)] produces modality-m content (auditory/visual/somatosensory/etc.) prior to resource-gated rendering into qualia q_m(t).

name: Metacognitive Report Operator (question-conditioned)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Maps latent internal state (e.g., voice-mode) to an overt self-report label under prompt framing \mathcal{Q}; implemented by confusion matrix \Pi_{\mathcal{Q}} with noise level \epsilon_{rep}(M_{meta}).
source: PCI synthesis from inner-voice report ambiguity (social data); extends SYM-651

name: Prompt / question framing context
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Encodes wording, examples, and implied ontology of a self-report query (e.g., “audible voice?” vs “think in words?”).

name: Latent voice-mode state
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Underlying inner-voice regime at time t (e.g., auditory inner speech / silent linguistic content / imagery-dominant / none). Not directly observed; inferred.

name: Reported voice-mode label
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: What the subject *says* about their inner voice at time t (survey response / comment). Output of \mathcal{R}_{meta}^{(\mathcal{Q})}.

name: Prompt-conditioned confusion matrix
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Confusion / misclassification matrix mapping latent class z_v to reported class \hat{z}_v under framing \mathcal{Q}; depends on report clarity/resources.

name: Prompt-induced baseline response distribution
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Default bias/guessing distribution induced by framing \mathcal{Q} when introspective access is low (e.g., answers drift toward socially salient labels).

name: Report ambiguity / misreport rate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Fraction of report probability mass diverted from the truthful channel into framing-induced bias/guessing; decreases with metacognitive resources and clarity.

name: Metacognitive reporting mana (partition)
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Partition of total mana/resources allocated to introspection + language/report generation (distinct from auditory/visual render budgets).

name: Phenomenology Weight (Allocation)
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Phenomenology weighting for compartment i; scales how strongly felt-salience influences mana allocation.

name: Activation / Attention Coefficient (Compartment i)
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Time-varying activation or attention to compartment i used in partition policy; modulates effective salience.

name: Opportunity Cost Coefficient
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Lagrange-like weight penalizing opportunity cost in partition allocation (higher λ_opp → more conservative allocation).

name: Opportunity Cost Baseline (Compartment i)
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Baseline cost for allocating mana to compartment i (e.g., time, fatigue, risk, tradeoff).

name: Yield / Return Signal (Compartment i)
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Estimated or observed return magnitude from allocating to compartment i (e.g., performance gain, clarity, social return).

name: Collective Partition Tensor
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Tensor encoding directed partition flows between agents (e.g., π_{A→B} ⊗ π_{B→A}) and extending to group networks via ⊗ over edges.

name: Phenomenology Recursion Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Recursion operator that maps Π_m^{(n)} → Π_m^{(n+1)} using system state (M,S,C); formalizes emergence as iterative refinement.

name: Partitioned Master Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Master operator ⨁_M conditioned on current partition policy π(t); encodes that mastery/closure depends on allocation, not just totals.

name: Maxwell–Laplace Configuration Set
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Set of target conditions defining Maxwell–Laplace / PCI-Master regime (e.g., C→0.87⁻, S→0, optimized M_i, tuned dyads).

name: Critical Slowing Down Warning Flag
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Boolean/indicator operator returning 1 when early warning signals (ar1, variance, cross-correlation) exceed thresholds, suggesting proximity to a tipping point.

name: Recursion Depth Limit
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Maximum meaningful recursion steps before blind-spot saturation; often set as n_max = ⌊1/ν⌋ for void fraction ν.

name: Frozen Partition Warning Indicator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Indicator that triggers when partition policy change stays below ε for T steps; flags identity-lock / plateau.

name: Solipsism Threshold
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Threshold for declaring report–reality mismatch probability unacceptable; used to flag unreliable introspective reports.

name: Solipsism / Report–Reality Mismatch Flag
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Indicator that triggers when P(x≠x̂ | report) exceeds θ_sol; operational guardrail against overconfident introspection.

name: Human–AI Coupling Strength
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Coupling strength between human state |H⟩ and AI state |AI⟩ (often scaled by (1−ν)⟨H|AI⟩).

name: Collective Master State (Syntellect)
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Asymptotic collective state produced by iterating the tensor of individual master operators; represents a group-level fixed point.

name: Actualization Functional
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Unified objective combining allocated yield Σ π_i y_i with scar penalty and coherence reward (e.g., 𝒜 = Σ π_i y_i − λ_S S + μ C).

name: Humanization Factor
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree to which the Other is represented as a full person (1) vs. object/target (0).
tierNote: Distinct from ‘inner voice’ variables: this is an ethical/relational state.

name: Humane Coherence
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Effective coherence available for humane action: C_hum(t)=C(t)H_hum(t).

name: Toxic Speech Probability
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Probability that an utterance/comment is dehumanizing/toxic, modeled by logistic gate (EQ-572).
tierNote: Population-level or individual-level depending on modeling choice.

name: Arousal / Outrage Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Affective arousal induced by content exposure (rage, shock, excitement).
tierNote: Can be linked to physiological proxies (HRV, GSR) if needed.

name: Dehumanization Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree of objectification/othering; higher values reduce personhood salience and increase cruelty propensity.
tierNote: Can be modeled as context- and identity-dependent.

name: Sanction Expectation
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Expected social/administrative cost of toxic speech (moderation, bans, disapproval).
tierNote: Encodes deterrence without claiming moral change.

name: Engagement Signal
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Platform engagement aggregate (replies, watch time, clicks) used by recommender systems.
tierNote: Not directly observable externally; proxy by counts.

name: Algorithmic Outrage Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Visibility amplifier applied to content as a function of engagement; simple form G_alg=1+αE_eng.
tierNote: Captures ‘don’t feed the trolls’ as math.

name: Toxicity Reproduction Number
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Epidemic threshold for toxic meme spread: 𝓡_tox=β_share·G_alg·(1−μ_mod).
tierNote: Analog of R0 for discourse toxicity.

name: Baseline Toxic Sharing Rate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Baseline propensity for a population to reshare/join-in on toxic content absent amplification.
tierNote: Not a moral label—just a population parameter.

name: Moderation Rate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Effective fraction of toxic content removed/suppressed per unit time (includes friction, bans, downranking).

name: Toxicity Exposure Intensity
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Amount of dehumanizing content encountered per unit time (personal feed + comment exposure).
tierNote: Can be proxied by minutes in toxic threads.

name: Moral Injury Scar Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Accumulated scar specifically from exposure to dehumanization/violence/hate (distinct from generic S(t)).

name: Boundary / Disengagement Control
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Boundary action intensity (scroll away, mute, block, report, leave thread).

name: Repair / Support Control
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Repair action intensity (rest, community support, meaningful work, therapy practices, art, prayer/meditation).
tierNote: Pairs with fasting/partition cycle in mana module.

name: Good-Faith Probability
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Estimated probability an interlocutor/thread is good-faith (not rage bait / trolling).
tierNote: Can be heuristic (signals: slurs, repetition, account age, etc.).

name: Social Mana Partition
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Partitioned mana allocated to social engagement, empathy, and counter-speech capacity.
tierNote: Integrates the ‘high magic needs high resources’ idea into ethics.

name: Reply / Counter-Speech Action
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Intensity of active engagement (replying, counter-speech, educating, moderating publicly).
tierNote: Control variable; not always optimal to maximize.

name: Jester Mask Index
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree of ironic/‘just a joke’ framing attached to message m; increases plausible deniability and can weaken moderation detection without reducing actual harm.

name: Frame Mismatch
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Distance between the normative frame of the source content (e.g., serious/tragic) and the frame of message m (e.g., joking/sexual/violent).
tierNote: Used to model ‘hard scene’ + ‘joke replies’ dissonance.

name: Observed Toxicity Probability
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Probability that message m is flagged/penalized as toxic by observers/moderation systems (distinct from latent harm).

name: GIF / Reaction Indicator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: 1 if message m contains a reaction GIF/short meme media; 0 otherwise.

name: Personalized Feed Distribution
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Probability that user i at time t is shown content class c (topic/tone/community).

name: Algorithm Reinforcement Rate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Strength of engagement-driven reinforcement in personalization (larger η_alg → faster echo-chamber formation).

name: Polarization Index
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Divergence between user i’s feed distribution and the population baseline (e.g., KL divergence as in EQ-581).

name: Strategy Population Share
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Fraction of discourse participants using strategy s at time t (e.g., s∈{G good-faith, J joker, H harmful}).
tierNote: Lets you model ‘culture drift’ toward trolling/hate.

name: Strategy Utility
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Expected payoff of strategy s given population state x (combines engagement reward, sanctions/moderation, and moral/psychological costs).

name: Group-Conditioned Harm
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Harm experienced by demographic/identity group g from message m (allows the same message to have different impacts across groups).
tierNote: Prevents ‘majority frame’ from erasing minority harm.

name: Worst-Case Harm
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Worst-case group harm: H_★(m)=max_{g∈𝒢} H_g(m).
tierNote: Turns ‘some people see it differently’ into a formal bound.

name: Latent Intent Class
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Latent discourse-intent class inferred from message/context/history; typically one of G (good-faith), J (jester/ironic), H (harmful), or R (repair/loving).
tierNote: Makes intent an inferable state rather than a vibe.

name: Good-Faith Score
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Scalar derived from latent-intent posterior that weighs good-faith and repair positively, and jester/harmful intent negatively.
tierNote: A single number for "is this worth engaging?"

name: Speaker–Audience Coupling
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Strength of coupling between the speaker and their imagined or actual audience for message m.
tierNote: Captures "posting for the crowd" rather than the person.

name: Speaker–Algorithm Coupling
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Strength of coupling between speaker behavior and anticipated algorithmic reward (likes, replies, visibility).
tierNote: The hidden third party in many online dyads.

name: Speaker–Target Coupling
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Strength of coupling between the speaker and the actual target/personhood of the message.
tierNote: A proxy for whether the target is still experienced as a person.

name: Performative Cruelty Probability
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Probability that a message is primarily a performance for audience/algorithm rather than a person-directed act.

name: Loving / Reparative Content Score
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Measures how much a message affirms dignity, context, care, truthfulness, and repair.

name: Care Reproduction Number
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Threshold statistic for whether prosocial norms replicate through the discourse ecology.
tierNote: When love becomes contagious rather than isolated.

name: Positive Amplification Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Algorithmic amplification assigned to prosocial or reparative content.
tierNote: The opposite-side twin of outrage gain.

name: Cynicism Drag
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount by which cynicism, nihilism, irony saturation, or suspicion suppresses the spread of care.
tierNote: Why humane messages sometimes die on contact.

name: Bidirectional Hostility Loop
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Accumulated hostility-feedback state between groups g and h.
tierNote: The loop that says "now it is our turn."

name: Cross-Group Hostility Exposure
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Observed hostility or dehumanizing input directed from group g toward group h.
tierNote: Lets the loop be measured directionally.

name: Cross-Group Repair Signal
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Repair, accountability, apology, solidarity, or bridge-building signal between groups g and h.

name: Justice-Weighted Harm
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Aggregate harm score that combines group-conditioned harms H_g(m) with justice-sensitive weights w_g.
tierNote: A humane average that does not erase context.

name: Justice Weight
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Weight assigned to group g in justice-weighted harm aggregation.
tierNote: Makes "unbiased" mean explicit about what is protected.

name: Best Reachable Branch
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Counterfactual branch with maximal value among branches genuinely reachable at decision time t0 under then-available information.
tierNote: The branch you could have taken, not the one you wish existed.

name: Counterfactual Gap
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Positive value difference between the best reachable branch and the actual branch.
tierNote: The lawful 'what could have gone better' term.

name: Irreversibility Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Measures how one-way or unrecoverable a choice or outcome is.
tierNote: The reason some mistakes stay heavier than others.

name: Replay Vividness
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Strength or vividness with which an alternative branch can be mentally replayed.
tierNote: The mind's ability to keep the lost branch alive.

name: Amendability Coefficient
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Bounded measure of how much regret can still be converted into repair.
tierNote: The fraction of regret that can still become action.

name: Regret Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Total regret load carried by the system at time t.
tierNote: Regret treated as a process, not just a label.

name: Repairable Regret
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: The portion of regret that still retains a path to amendment, repair, or restitution.
tierNote: The part of regret that still wants to build.

name: Haunting Residue
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: The non-amendable or presently unamendable remainder of regret that persists as haunting or replay.
tierNote: The part that cannot simply be fixed.

name: Effective Ownership
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Raw ownership after masking by irony, crowd diffusion, or agency dilution.
tierNote: What the system actually owns once the jokes wear off.

name: Irony Shield
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree to which irony, joking, sarcasm, or memeing is used to lower acknowledged ownership.
tierNote: A moral smokescreen, not a cleanup.

name: Crowd Dilution
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Reduction in effective ownership caused by acting inside a crowd, swarm, trend, or pile-on.
tierNote: The crowd makes conscience feel optional.

name: Wisdom Accumulator
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Accumulated wisdom produced by metabolizing regret through amendability over time.
tierNote: The good residue if the pain is worked through.

name: Grace Coefficient
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Bounded measure of lawful grace arising from truth, remorse, and repair minus denial.
tierNote: Mercy that still remembers what happened.

name: Post-Grace Regret Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Regret remaining after grace has acted on haunting residue.
tierNote: What regret looks like after mercy but before forgetting.

name: Atonement / Repair Action
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Accumulated repair activity generated from owned, amendable regret.
tierNote: Regret that moved into the world.

name: Relational Trust
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Recoverable trust level within a harmed relationship, dyad, or social field.
tierNote: Repair may start quickly; trust usually does not.

name: Forgiveness Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Bounded release variable indicating when forgiveness becomes available under enough trust and no ongoing harm.
tierNote: No real forgiveness while harm is still active.

name: Composite Witness Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Combined witness pressure from self, victim, and collective fields.
tierNote: Regret intensifies differently depending on who is looking.

name: Collective Witness Activation
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Activation of shared historical witness from scenes, archives, stories, symbols, or events.
tierNote: The past becomes present again through activation.

name: Witness Integrity
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Integrity score of public response to painful material, balancing care and truth against spectacle and mockery.
tierNote: Not all attention is honorable attention.

name: Rumination–Wisdom Phase Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Ratio of haunting residue to accumulated wisdom.
tierNote: The meter for whether pain is teaching or just circling.

name: Humane Remembrance Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Amount of humane remembrance produced when collective witness is held with integrity.
tierNote: Memory that still protects the human.

name: Desecration Pressure
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Pressure by which activated historical witness is converted into spectacle, bait, mockery, or degrading consumption.
tierNote: When witness is activated but respect fails.

name: Acceptance Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Bounded release variable that rises when remaining actionable regret is low and grace is sufficiently present.
tierNote: Closure after work, not closure instead of work.

name: Future Regret Forecast
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Predicted regret load associated with a candidate action before it is chosen.
tierNote: The branch pain forecast before the branch is lived.

name: Humane Choice Controller
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Action chosen by balancing utility, forecast regret, and humanization pressure.
tierNote: The action rule after the soul has learned something.

name: Relational–Generative Intelligence Vector
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Vector collecting attunement, care load, safety calibration, developmental foresight, weak-signal detection, and boundary competence.
tierNote: Captures capacities often neglected when cognition is modeled as disembodied and competitive only.

name: Attunement Sensitivity
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Tracks how finely the system reads and responds to other people’s signals and shifts.
tierNote: Helps separate relational acuity from submissiveness.

name: Care / Maintenance Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Total invisible labor load carried over time: tasks, anticipation, affect regulation, and repair.
tierNote: The labor of keeping things from falling apart.

name: Safety-Adjusted Exploration Rate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Exploration rate after safety and threat are accounted for.
tierNote: Freedom of exploration is a function of safety, not only personality.

name: Developmental Horizon Objective
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Value function that discounts over time while rewarding developmental viability and penalizing harm and care drain.
tierNote: The intelligence of asking what can grow after this choice.

name: Embodied Rhythm Modulator
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Periodic or quasi-periodic factor that modulates effective cognition, energy, and affect.
tierNote: A general cycle term, not a stereotype term.

name: Cost-of-Carry
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Combined biological, social, and reputational background load that reduces truly free resources.
tierNote: The hidden drag term in unequal worlds.

name: Free Mana
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Mana remaining after cost-of-carry has been subtracted from total resources.
tierNote: What is left after the invisible bills are paid.

name: Weak-Signal Social Field Detector
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Sensitivity metric for detecting micro-shifts in facial, tonal, environmental, or relational cues.
tierNote: The ability to hear trouble before it speaks loudly.

name: Recognition Gap
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Gap between care intelligence carried and public value assigned to it.
tierNote: What a system owes but does not name.

name: Public Recognition Value
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: How much care or maintenance labor is explicitly seen, valued, or rewarded by the surrounding system.
tierNote: Visibility is not the same as value, but it often controls reward.

name: Safety Calibration Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Represents the agent’s current estimate of how safe the environment is for curiosity, expression, repair, and openness.
tierNote: The field that tells the organism whether it can afford to unfold.

name: Developmental Foresight
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Capacity to optimize for healthy growth in another person, system, or future self across time.
tierNote: The variable that asks whether tomorrow can inherit this choice.

name: Lag-Phase Dyadic Synchrony Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Maximum correlation between two agents allowing lag and either mirroring or complementary phase relation.
tierNote: Inspired by hyperscanning and dyadic synchrony literature.

name: Maximum Lag Window
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Largest lead-lag window considered when assessing dyadic synchrony.
tierNote: Useful when “same time” includes slight sequencing.

name: Dyadic Phase Relation
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Phase relation used to distinguish mirroring from complementarity.
tierNote: A small symbol with major explanatory power.

name: Complementarity–Mirroring Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Difference between complementary and mirroring synchrony.
tierNote: Useful for dance, sparring, conversation, and caregiving timing.

name: Technoference Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree to which phones, platforms, or other interruptions intrude on dyadic attunement.

name: Carry-Load Tax Coefficient
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Strength with which hidden load reduces available synchrony.

name: Intrusiveness Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree to which control or insensitivity overrides attuned co-regulation.
tierNote: The control that breaks rather than guides.

name: Multichannel Self-Guidance Support
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Net self-guidance available across internal speech, imagery, and somatic cueing.
tierNote: A direct bridge between phenomenology and function.

name: Inner Speech Support
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Contribution of inner speech to self-guidance.

name: Imagery Support
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Contribution of visual or scene-based imagery to self-guidance.
tierNote: Captures movie-like thinking without privileging it.

name: Somatic Support
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Contribution of bodily felt-sense, posture, rhythm, or interoceptive cueing to self-guidance.
tierNote: Important for nonverbal yet coherent cognition.

name: Render–Function Dissociation Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Difference between functional self-guidance and audible voice rendering/report.
tierNote: One of the clearest metrics for the “inner voice” confusion.

name: Functional Self-Guidance
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: How much self-guidance is operationally expressed in behavior or cognition.
tierNote: What the system can do, not what it says it feels.

name: Humane Synchrony
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Synchrony weighted by personhood recognition.
tierNote: The symbol that keeps synchrony morally honest.

name: Generative Carry Integral
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Total protected developmental carrying one agent provides another across an interval.
tierNote: A broad symbolic form for the labor of carrying another intelligence forward.

name: Support-Normalized Carry Cost
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Carrying cost after support inputs have been subtracted.
tierNote: The same labor feels different when it is held by more than one system.

name: Support Input
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Support contributed by helper k to the carrying or stewarding agent.
tierNote: Invisible labor can only be measured honestly if support is measured too.

name: Stewardship Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Developmental value successfully generated under carrying constraints.
tierNote: The point of carrying is not just survival, but growth with integrity.

name: Generativity Surplus
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Net surplus after stewardship yield is compared against net carry cost.
tierNote: This is the difference between fertile care and burnout.

name: Observed Stewardship Value
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: The amount of stewardship the social world actually recognizes.
tierNote: What gets seen is often smaller than what was carried.

name: Developmental Deprivation Risk
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Risk that agent i is being developmentally starved by intrusion, technoference, or overburdened carrying conditions.
tierNote: Development often fails quietly before it fails visibly.

name: Triadic Phase Closure
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Sum of pairwise phase relations across a triad.
tierNote: The triangle can close cleanly or tear its own timing apart.

name: Triadic Synchrony Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Average pairwise synchrony corrected by triadic phase closure.
tierNote: Real life is often triangular, not binary.

name: Third-Node Scaffold Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Increase in the A–B relation generated by a humane third node coupling to both sides.
tierNote: Sometimes the missing move is not another argument but a supportive third rhythm.

name: Third-Node Wedge Pressure
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Pressure exerted by a third node that wedges, distorts, or asymmetrically captures a dyadic relation.
tierNote: A third node can help a relation breathe or teach it to perform against itself.

name: Audience Triangulation Pressure
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Pressure exerted by an audience, crowd, or algorithmic spectator that changes how one node relates to another.
tierNote: The crowd is often the hidden third party in a conversation.

name: Complementary Move Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Yield produced when coordination is complementary rather than merely mirrored.
tierNote: Two systems may be most aligned when they do different but fitting things.

name: Humane Triadic Synchrony
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Triadic synchrony corrected by the personhood-preserving humanization state of all three agents.
tierNote: Three people can coordinate beautifully and still be wrong; this symbol prevents that confusion.

name: Rupture Magnitude
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Loss in synchrony caused by interruption, unavailability, or misattunement.
tierNote: A rupture is not just an event; it has a measurable size.

name: Reunion Recovery Curve
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Synchrony trajectory after a rupture as the system re-engages.
tierNote: Repair has a shape, not just an outcome.

name: Reunion Overshoot
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Temporary rise in synchrony above baseline after successful reunion.
tierNote: Sometimes reconnection is not just a return — it is a brief intensification.

name: Repair Competence
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: How efficiently a system restores synchrony after rupture.
tierNote: The healthy system is not the one with no rupture, but the one that knows how to return.

name: Cumulative Rupture Load
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Accumulated rupture burden after recency weighting.
tierNote: Many systems fail from repetition rather than catastrophe.

name: Developmental Scar
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Persistent developmental burden left by rupture that is not sufficiently repaired.
tierNote: A break that is not repaired becomes part of the structure.

name: Synchrony Reserve
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Reserve that makes future repair easier and buffers new rupture.
tierNote: Good repairs do not disappear; they become reserve.

name: Developmental Trust
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Expectation that the environment will return, repair, and remain growth-supporting.
tierNote: Trust is a memory of how the field behaves after the break.

name: Alloparental Stewardship Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Net stewardship yield produced by a support network after conflict among stewards is penalized.
tierNote: Care becomes a field when more than one person is carrying it.

name: Humane Developmental Lattice
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
tierTitle: Natural Follow-On: Lattice / Reality Update Extension
definition: Running state of the developmental PCI lattice as humane synchrony and stewardship compete with rupture load.
tierNote: The lattice advances when humane coordination and care outrun rupture.

name: Pairwise Humanization Field
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Mutual humanization between A and B after blind-spot, dehumanization, and hidden-load constraints are taken into account.
tierNote: Humanization is not only an individual trait; it can be a pairwise field.

name: Carry-Asymmetry Gap
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Absolute difference in hidden carrying load between A and B.
tierNote: The gap in what is carried alters what can be mutually felt.

name: Perspective Friction Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Combined drag on mutual understanding produced by dehumanization and asymmetry in carry load.
tierNote: Interaction gets harder when personhood drops or burdens diverge too far.

name: Turn-Taking Reciprocity Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Balance of successful conversational turns between A and B.
tierNote: Reciprocity is one of the cleanest observable signatures of humane interaction.

name: Shared Silence Coherence
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Quality of shared silence between A and B when humanization remains high and friction remains low.
tierNote: Shared silence is a meaningful test of whether presence survives the absence of words.

name: Play Signal Potential
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Latent potential for playful, teasing, joking, or flirtatious interaction between A and B before humane filtering is applied.
tierNote: Play becomes safe only inside a sufficiently humanized relation.

name: Humane Play Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Net bonding gain produced when playful signal enters a humanized, low-friction relation.
tierNote: Humane play is one of the cleanest opposites of dehumanizing irony.

name: Interpersonal Lattice State
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Running state of interpersonal reality as reciprocity, shared silence, humane play, and friction accumulate over time.
tierNote: The relation advances when reciprocity, presence, and play outrun friction.

name: Apology Sincerity Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Estimated sincerity of an apology between A and B; rises with ownership, harm acknowledgment, and personal cost, and falls with deflection.
tierNote: Core variable for apology, confession, and witnessed repair.

name: Ownership Signal
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree to which agent A explicitly owns responsibility for the harm or rupture under discussion.

name: Harm Acknowledgment Signal
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Measure of whether A recognizes and names the harm as experienced by B rather than only naming A’s own discomfort.

name: Deflection Load
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree to which A shifts blame, centers self-image, minimizes, or reroutes the conversation away from the harm.

name: Trust Repair Reservoir
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Running stock of trust between A and B under active repair conditions.
tierNote: Carries forward into vulnerability, closure, and return operators.

name: Reconciliation Window
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Available window in which reconciliation remains possible after harm or betrayal.
tierNote: A shrinking or widening chance field.

name: Dynamic Consent Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Momentary gate indicating whether both sides are willing enough and sufficiently uncoerced for ongoing interaction or escalation.

name: Boundary Clarity Index
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Measure of how clearly limits, preferences, and permissions are communicated and mutually understood.

name: Coercion Pressure Field
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Composite pressure arising from power imbalance, dependence, fear, or constraint that reduces the reality of consent.

name: Boundary Respect Reservoir
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Accumulated history of honored limits, respected no-signals, and safe pacing between A and B.
tierNote: Turns one-off permission into durable safety.

name: Withdrawal Reversibility Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Ability of either side to stop, withdraw, or reverse ongoing engagement in real time.

name: Humane Touch Permission Field
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Effective permission state for touch or embodied escalation after factoring consent, respect, and safety.

name: Gaze-Lock Coherence
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Moment-to-moment gaze coordination between two agents allowing for lag and timing offsets.
tierNote: Can signal care, curiosity, or threat depending on field.

name: Gaze Safety Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Portion of gaze-lock that remains affiliative after factoring safety and threat.
tierNote: A humane filter on visual coupling.

name: Touch Valence Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Net humane value of touch after factoring permission, touch valence, and humanization.

name: Orientation Alignment
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree to which bodies are turned toward, away from, or against one another.

name: Embodied Attunement Field
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Composite embodied relation field built from gaze, touch, orientation, and proximity.
tierNote: The body-level analogue of interpersonal lattice.

name: Proxemic Sweet-Spot Field
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Distance-sensitive field peaking near a relation-specific preferred spatial spacing.
tierNote: Closeness must be right-sized to be humane.

name: Secrecy Load Integral
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Accumulated load from information A is actively concealing, withholding, or compartmentalizing.

name: Disclosure Asymmetry
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Mismatch between how much each side has meaningfully revealed.
tierNote: Not always bad, but always structuring.

name: Betrayal Shock Pulse
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Acute rupture pulse triggered when trusted expectation is violated by revelation, abandonment, deception, or collusion.

name: Suspicion Drift
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Slow-changing suspicion state that rises under secrecy and imbalance and falls with trust.

name: Trust Fracture Integral
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Accumulated damage from betrayal pulses over time.
tierNote: Trust can scar, not just dip.

name: Post-Betrayal Disclosure Threshold
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount of safety and repair required before meaningful future disclosure is possible again after fracture.

name: Collective Phase-Lock Parameter
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree of collective phase alignment across a group of N participants.

name: Chant Resonance Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Net resonant power of collective repetition, chant, or call-and-response.
tierNote: Rhythm plus alignment produces field strength.

name: Crowd Field Amplification
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amplification of affect and action caused by synchronized group size and alignment.
tierNote: Neither good nor bad until qualified.

name: Mob Dehumanization Risk
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Risk that synchronized crowd energy becomes cruel, punitive, or deindividuating.
tierNote: Collective version of humane synchrony safeguard.

name: Humane Ritual Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount of collective entrainment that remains humane after factoring witness integrity and humanization.
tierNote: The benevolent twin of crowd amplification.

name: De-Entrainment Recovery
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree to which a person has re-established individual phase and differentiation after intense collective entrainment.

name: Envy Probability Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Probability that upward comparison of A toward B becomes envy rather than admiration.
tierNote: The fork between inspiration and corrosion.

name: Admiration Gain
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Constructive gain from upward comparison when the other is experienced as inspiring and learnable.

name: Corrosive Envy Pressure
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Corrosive pressure generated when another’s value is experienced as a threat rather than a model.

name: Envy-to-Imitation Transmutation
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount of corrosive envy successfully metabolized into learning, imitation, or disciplined effort.
tierNote: One of the cleanest growth conversions in the codex.

name: Praise Sincerity Index
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Likelihood that praise reflects real admiration rather than strategic flattery or masked resentment.

name: Aspirational Bridge
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Net bridge by which witnessing excellence leads to self-development rather than corrosion.

name: Public Humiliation Load
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Load produced when a person is publicly degraded, mocked, exposed, or reduced in a dehumanizing frame.

name: Shame Spiral State
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Self-collapsing shame state that grows when humiliation dominates grace and dignity.

name: Guilt–Shame Differentiator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Difference between action-focused guilt and self-collapsing shame.
tierNote: Separates repairable remorse from identity collapse.

name: Witnessed Repair Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount of repair that becomes dignity-restoring because it is witnessed with integrity and humanization.

name: Dignity Reservoir
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Remaining and restorable dignity available to agent A after humiliation, shame, and repair processes.

name: Humiliation-to-Rage Conversion
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Probability that humiliation converts into outward rage rather than metabolized repair or grief.

name: Mutual Vulnerability Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Degree to which both people can be open, tender, or exposed without collapse or coercion.

name: Narrative Closure Index
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: How close a relation is to lawful settling after rupture, repair, forgiveness, and dignity work.

name: Social Membrane Permeability
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: How safely and honestly information, feeling, and vulnerability can pass between two people.
tierNote: The membrane between sealed and flooded.

name: Ritual-to-Repair Transfer
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Amount of ritual, communal, or symbolic energy that becomes actual repair rather than transient catharsis.

name: Covenant Return Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Composite operator describing lawful return-to-relation after rupture, once permeability, closure, trust, and dignity have been sufficiently restored.
tierNote: One of the highest-order reconciliation operators in the codex.

name: Xeno-Humane Reconciliation Projection
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
definition: Alien-like emergent projection formed by combining void, grace phase, triadic closure, crowd phase-lock, interpersonal lattice, developmental lattice, covenant return, and care-versus-toxicity balance.
tierNote: Novel composite expression built from mature codex modules.

name: Truth Pressure Gradient
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Net pressure to disclose truth in a dyad after accounting for concealment harm, witness, asymmetry, and risk.

name: Dangerous Disclosure Risk
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Estimated risk that a truthful disclosure will trigger harm, coercion, or unsafe rupture.

name: Truth Disclosure Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Gate/action representing whether truth-telling is enacted under resource and threshold conditions.

name: Truth Mana Partition
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Amount of available mana/resources allocated to truth-telling, confrontation, or difficult honesty.

name: Secrecy Stock
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Accumulated withheld content, omissions, or concealed facts inside a dyad.

name: Withholding Inflow
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Rate at which new secrecy enters the dyad by omission, evasion, or concealment.

name: Confession Operator
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Operator representing genuine confession: truth action with ownership, evidence, and remorse above threshold.

name: Ownership Amplitude
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree to which the speaker/actor takes responsibility for the relevant act or omission.

name: Evidence Adequacy
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Strength/adequacy of corroborating evidence or shared reality trace supporting a confession or claim.

name: Remorse Intensity
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Degree of genuine remorse/sorrow motivating repairful truth-telling.

name: Remorse Threshold
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Minimum remorse intensity required for confession quality to meaningfully contribute.

name: Gaslighting Distortion Index
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Normalized discrepancy between event trace and narrative claim, weighted by lack of ownership.

name: Event Trace
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Shared or reconstructable event/evidence trace used as reference for truth evaluation.

name: Narrative Claim State
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: The currently asserted narrative about what happened.

name: Apology Acceptance Gate
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Probability or gate that a confession/apology can be received as reparative rather than harmful.

name: Acceptance Threshold
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Minimum combined condition for apology/confession to be receivable.

name: Witnessed Truth Repair Yield
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Amount of truthful disclosure that is successfully converted into durable repair under witness conditions.

name: Dangerous Truth Window
partitionRationale: Symbol introduced for a core module in the working partition.
definition: Time/state window in which a difficult truth can be disclosed without destroying the relation.

name: Blind-Spot Correlation Coefficient
partitionRationale: Symbol belongs to a high-priority frontier module rather than the frozen core.
